raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX24 XXXX XXXX  MST - Received a text from Citi Card We need to speak to you about XXXX XXXX XXXX, Please call XXXX XX/XX/XXXX24 XXXX XXXX MST - Called Citi phone number as instructed. Reviewed and identified fraudulent charges on account with Citi agent. Informed them that my card has been in my possession. Citi inactivated the compromised card and instructed me that they would be sending me a replacement. Fraudulent charges were marked for dispute and internal review. 

XX/XX/XXXX24 XXXXXXXX XXXX. MST - After reviewing disputed charges on Citi website for my account, I noticed that all XXXX charges ( totaling {$2500.00} ) that I had disputed on the call on XX/XX/XXXX stated " Your dispute has been resolved and no credit has been issued ''. I asked the Citi agent the reason why, and was informed that that department does not work on the weekends and a letter with details would be sent to me. She stated it was sent on XXXX. 

XX/XX/XXXX24 - Filed police report with XXXX Colorado Police Dept ( XXXX ) Spoke with XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX24 - Received call back from XXXX Colorado Police. Spoke with XXXX XXXX XXXX. Submitted all relevant details requested via Fraud Packet as instructed. Was provided case number ( XXXX ) XX/XX/XXXX24 - Received letter from Citi 's Security Operations Service Team ( Dated XX/XX/XXXX24 ), which stated We've completed our investigation and your dispute ( s ) is closed. 

The card 's EMV chip was used to make the disputed transaction ( s ) at the chip card reader. You verified that your card was in your possession at the time of the transaction ( s ), so we don't consider this fraudulent activity. 

The charges ( s ) totaling {$2500.00}. will remain on your account, under your account activity ''
